sb_prompt: DISCUSS POSSIBLE CHANGES IN THE WAY TRIALS BY JURY ARE CONDUCTED.     FOR EXAMPLE
raw_output:
ParticipantA: So, have you ever been involved in a trial by jury?

ParticipantB: No, I haven't. But I've always been interested in the legal system.

ParticipantA: Same here. I think it's important to have a fair and impartial trial.

ParticipantB: Absolutely. I think one possible change could be to make the jury selection process more diverse.

ParticipantA: I agree. It's important to have a jury that represents the community.

ParticipantB: And maybe have more education on the part of the jurors so they can better understand the case.

ParticipantA: That's a good point. I think it would also be helpful if the jury could ask questions during the trial.

ParticipantB: Yes, that would definitely help them better understand the case.

ParticipantA: And maybe have some kind of anonymous voting system so jurors can't be influenced by outside factors.

ParticipantB: That's a great idea. Overall, I think there are a lot of ways we can improve the trial by jury process.

ParticipantA: Definitely. It's important to keep the legal system fair and just for everyone.

ParticipantB: Agreed. Thanks for chatting with me about this topic.

ParticipantA: No problem. It was great talking to you.
